title: Homeostatic Retexture
description: New more smooth textures for Homeostatic mod by wendall911.
body:
New textures for **Homeostatic** mod.
This resource pack replaces old mod textures with new ones, which are more smooth and have a limited color palette.

Almost all textures have been redrawn in particular: items, purified water block and gui icons.
The new style was aimed be more pleasing to the eye and also limit the color palette that I had to work with.

The texture pack is suitable for those who want to play with a good mod in a new guise.
Examples of modified textures can be found in the images tab.

[Curseforge Homeostatic mode page.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/homeostatic)
